# L3 Test Coverage Index (GENERATED — do not edit by hand)

This file is GENERATED by `tool/mcp_test/gen_scenario_index.dart` from three sources of truth:
the scenario JSONs (`tool/mcp_test/scenarios/*.json`), the Fixture C manifest (`tool/mcp_test/fixture_c_manifest.json`),
and the L3 playbook headers (`test/mcp/S*.md`). Edits here are overwritten.

Regenerate: `dart run tool/mcp_test/gen_scenario_index.dart`

Freshness gate (CI / pre-commit): `dart run tool/mcp_test/gen_scenario_index.dart --check --warn-playbook-headers`

Plan: `doc/research/TEST_CASE_ORGANIZATION_PLAN.en.md` §3.3. Execution class is derived from each scenario JSON's flags:
`uiDriven` → `l3-ui-single`; else `requiresEchoPeer` → `l3-gate-echo`; else `l3-gate`.

## Coverage by scenario (S-number)

One row per L3 playbook (`test/mcp/S*.md`), numeric order. "Executable artifacts" lists the
machine-runnable gates that cover the scenario: L3 runner JSON ids (via each JSON's `feature`),
Fixture C two-process scripts (via `tool/mcp_test/fixture_c_manifest.json`), and any `Covered-by:` flutter-test paths.

## Appendix: playbook header warnings

Playbooks missing one of the five required header fields (Layer / Fixture vector / Harness mode / Promotion target / Status).
Hard-gated by `--check` (M9b: the residue is zero, so header completeness now fails the gate — plan §3.3 / M9).

_None — every playbook carries the full canonical header._
